problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: Combining Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
